title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
